content:
Women Technology Funding Programs

{/* NRC IRAP */}
NRC Industrial Research Assistance Program (IRAP)

Technology R&D Funding

Funding Amount: Up to $10M

• Non-repayable contributions for R&D projects

• Advisory services from technology experts

• Networking and partnership support

• Women-led tech startups eligible

Ideal For

Software Development: Innovative applications and platforms

AI/ML Projects: Artificial intelligence and machine learning R&D

Clean Tech: Environmental technology solutions

Hardware: Advanced technology product development

{/* Innovate BC */}
Innovate BC Women in Technology Programs

BC Tech Innovation Funding

Program Type: Grants & Acceleration

• Women-led tech startup support

• Innovation vouchers and grants

• Acceleration and mentorship programs

• Commercialization support services

BC Tech Focus

Vancouver Tech Hub: Software, AI, clean tech clusters

Women Accelerators: BC-based tech acceleration programs

Scale-Up Support: Growth-stage technology companies

Export Assistance: International market expansion

{/* Alberta Innovates */}
Alberta Innovates Women Tech Innovation

Alberta Tech Funding

Focus: Innovation & Commercialization

Provincial Crown corporation supporting women in AI, clean energy, agriculture technology, health innovation, and digital transformation with grants, investments, and commercialization support.

Program Areas

AI & Digital: Machine learning and automation

Clean Energy: Environmental technology solutions

Health Tech: Medical devices and digital health

Agri-Food: Agriculture technology innovation

{/* Ontario Creates */}
Ontario Creates - Digital Media & Interactive Content

Interactive Digital Media Support

Industry: Digital Media & Games

• Interactive digital media production funding

• Video game development support

• Content creation and publishing

• Women creators and producers eligible

Creative Tech Support

Gaming: Video game development and publishing

VR/AR: Immersive technology content

Animation: Digital animation production

Interactive: Web and mobile applications

{/* AI & ML Specific Programs */}
AI & Machine Learning Women Funding

Artificial Intelligence Support

Technology: AI/ML Innovation

Specialized funding for women entrepreneurs developing artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision solutions through federal SR&ED tax credits and provincial AI research programs.

AI Funding Sources

SR&ED Tax Credits: Up to 35% refundable for R&D

MITACS: Research partnerships and internships

AI Institutes: Vector, Mila, Amii collaboration funding

NRC IRAP: AI project development support

{/* Women Tech Accelerators */}
Women-Focused Tech Accelerators & Programs

Acceleration Programs

Focus: Women Tech Startups

• Funding + mentorship + network access

• Vancouver, Toronto, Montreal programs

• Sector-specific (AI, clean tech, software)

• Demo day and investor connections

Leading Accelerators

L-SPARK: Ottawa SaaS and cloud technology women founders

Alate Partners: BC women tech entrepreneurs

MaRS Discovery: Toronto women innovation programs

Highline Beta: Montreal women startup ventures
shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Canadian women technology grants with NRC IRAP, Innovate BC, Alberta Innovates, AI funding, software development support, and digital innovation programs.
shortAnswerQuestion: What grants are available for women-owned businesses in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Women in Technology Grants Canada  | AI, Software & Digital Innovation Funding in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Women in Technology Grants Canada  | AI, Software & Digital Innovation Funding?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Typically, grants cover a percentage of eligible project costs.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Provincial Tech Stacking
expertTip.content: Combine federal NRC IRAP with provincial tech grants (Innovate BC, Alberta Innovates, Ontario Centres of Excellence) for 70-80% total R&D cost coverage.
